exploration_notes:
All five key multi-process architecture files were located in the local chromium checkout:

1. **RenderProcessHostImpl** — `content/browser/renderer_host/render_process_host_impl.h` (line 195) / `.cc`. Browser-side representation of a renderer process; declared as `class CONTENT_EXPORT RenderProcessHostImpl`.

2. **BrowserMainLoop** — `content/browser/browser_main_loop.h` (line 106) / `.cc`. The main browser-process event loop; declared as `class CONTENT_EXPORT BrowserMainLoop`.
